title: Azalea barbata
taxonomy: Azalea barbata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a member of the genus Rhododendron, with the specific epithet 'barbata' indicating a unique characteristic of the plant. The Ericaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as heath or heather plants. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Azalea barbata belonging to the subfamily Ericoideae. The Rhododendron genus is a large group of flowering plants with over 1,000 species, including Azalea barbata.
